title: Definition
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3.  KINDS OF OBLIGATIONS

SECTION 1.  REAL OBLIGATIONS

Art. 1763.  Definition

A real obligation is a duty correlative and incidental to a real right.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
